elements.label: Description
elements.value: Large fruit. Seeing one means a good chain happened. Merges into Pineapple.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/peach.schema.json, set ct_peach_radius to {{ct_peach_radius}}]
Set Peach radius to {{ct_peach_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/peach.schema.json, set ct_peach_score to {{ct_peach_score}}]
Set Peach merge score to {{ct_peach_score}} points.
